title: CSSC - Create Style for SecuryCraft
description: Ressource pack to import Create mod artstyle into the SecurityCraft mod
body:
# CSSC – Create Style for SecurityCraft A resource pack that gives [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) a visual makeover to match the steampunk aesthetic of the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod. ![All the current edited blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/660479c141a927b6de58825f69b818425e62aafd.jpeg)
Currently supported blocks : Alarm
Block Change Detector
Camera Monitor
Chest
Codebreaker
Display case
Electrified Iron Fence
Electrified Iron Gate
Frame
Glow Display case
Inventory Scanner
Key panel
Keycard lock
Keycard reader
Keycards
Keypad
Keypad blast furnace
Keypad door
Keypad furnace
Keypad smoker
Keypad trapdoor
Laser block
Mine Remote Access Tool
Motion Activated Light
Panic button
Portable Tune Player
Projector
Reinforced door
Retinal scanner
Retinal scanner door
Retinal scanner trapdoor
Rift Stabilizer
Secure Redstone Interface
Security camera
Sentry
Sentry Remote Access Tool
Universal Key Changer
Username logger
